hints: app.go (App struct, 18 functions) is the central Bubbletea model — handles Init/Update/View plus commands
types.go defines all message types (15 types) — the Bubbletea message vocabulary
channels.go (channelsModel, 7 functions) and dashboard.go (dashboardModel, 6 functions) — two main views
Bidirectional coupling with cmd (tui->cmd: 4, cmd->tui: 3) — likely through adapter interfaces defined in main.go
